allow: Bash(python -c "import numpy as np; print\(''numpy:'', np.__version__\)")
Bash(".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import numpy as np; print\(''numpy:'', np.__version__\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\); import sys; print\(sys.executable\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import scipy; print\('scipy', scipy.__version__\); import openpyxl; print\('openpyxl', openpyxl.__version__\); import matplotlib; print\('matplotlib', matplotlib.__version__\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install scipy openpyxl matplotlib)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from scipy import stats; import numpy as np; vals = np.random.randn\(20\); labels = ['A']*10 + ['B']*10; r = stats.tukey_hsd\(vals, groups=labels\); print\(type\(r\)\); print\(r.summary\(\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from scipy import stats; import numpy as np; help\(stats.tukey_hsd\)")
